content.en:
"Little junior brother, the path of cultivation seems to have the extreme, but it doesn't seem to have the extreme. It's like in the era before Shizun, there was no such thing as the will of the Transformation Realm and the primordial-level control body. But someone broke the limit and created this realm, and the realm was broken and moved to a higher level. It's like Shizun, who has broken the extreme of the Ten Realm-level controllers, and surpassed the realm of the eternal controllers in half a step, maybe one day, the masters will take this step and create a new realm. "

Jiang Youdao.

"That's right!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian chatted with Senior Brother Jiang You for a long time, and Senior Brother was very good and enthusiastic.

Although it is said that among the four senior brothers and sisters, the senior brother is the weakest, it is still a realm that Ye Tian cannot reach at present.

Soon after, Ye Tian took his leave and returned to his residence to continue his practice.

Right now, he didn't have any hope of raising the Ninth Order Peak Will to the Transformation Realm, but at least he had a goal.

As for the body of control, it can only be slowly improved, and it is not in a hurry.

And the changes in many ways have to be understood one by one, and they are also impatient.

At his level, every time he progresses, it is very difficult, and it is naturally impossible to progress as quickly as before.

Time flies, and hundreds of thousands of rivers have passed.

this day.

The Eternal Hall of the Void Region conveyed a message to Ye Tian.

"The Silver Demon Master has fallen?"

It was the white-bearded old man who conveyed the news, so there must be no error in the message.

"How could the Silver Demon Controller fall?" Ye Tian was a little curious.

Although the Silver Demon Controller was weak in his eyes, and even had some contradictions with him, after all, he was an eternal controller of the Void Region, so he naturally had some concern and would not ignore this matter.

The white-bearded old man said: "How did the Silver Demon Master fall, we don't know, according to the intelligence, he almost didn't go to any forbidden places, and the Silver Demon Master has always been very timid, but this time he was on the way to Fengming City, and he suddenly fell silently." He fell so fast that he didn't even deliver any news, and some of the incarnations he left behind dissipated in an instant. "

"Killed by the other Eternal Master?"

Ye Tian guessed.

"It should be. "

The white-bearded old man nodded.

He didn't doubt Ye Tian, because at Ye Tian's level, if he had killed the Silver Demon Master, he would have killed him a long time ago, and he would not wait until today.

Therefore, he came to Ye Tian to talk about the situation.

"Is there a suspicion?" Ye Tian asked.

The white-bearded old man shook his head, "There are no clues, even if you spy on time and space, you can't find any traces." "

Spying on planes is something that Eternal Masters love to do, but it's easy to disrupt space-time exploration.

Therefore, if the enemy wants to kill the Silver Demon Master, it is impossible to leave a trace of time and space.

"Old man Whitebeard, you go and investigate, and if you have any clues, tell me. "

Ye Tiandao.

"Good!"

The white-bearded old man nodded.

He also knew that it was just the fall of a Silver Demon master, and it was not worth Ye Tian to investigate personally, in case it was just a simple vendetta, Ye Tian would not even take revenge on others.

After all, vendettas are common, and the Silver Demon is not his relative, so why should he take revenge?

But if it's for the Void Zone, then he definitely won't sit idly by.

Another period of time passed, and the white-bearded old man came to Ye Tian again.

"Infinite Master, the situation seems to be a little complicated, and the number of fallen Eternal Masters in the Thirteenth Realm has been a bit large recently. The white-bearded old man said.

"The number of Eternal Master's Falls is high?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Yes!" the white-bearded old man said: "It stands to reason that the Eternal Masters are not easy to fall, and the Thirteenth Boundary River has not had any major incidents recently, so the frequency of fighting between the Eternal Masters is not high, but in the last tens of thousands of Realm River years, the Eternal Masters have fallen by more than three digits, which is not normal." "

"The Eternal Master of the Tridigit has fallen!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Although there are many eternal controllers of the thirteenth boundary river, a giant city has one or several eternal controllers, and the thirteenth boundary river has as many giant cities and as many forces.

It can be said that the eternal controllers of the Thirteenth Boundary River are at least hundreds of thousands, if not more.

Therefore, it is not surprising at all that the death of a few Eternal Masters, and even the death of a dozen will cause some waves.

However, dying in more than three digits in a short period of time is not normal.

"How did these Eternal Masters die?" Ye Tian asked.

The white-bearded old man hurriedly said: "According to our investigation, most of them fell silently, and the murderers could not be found, and only a few were killed by other eternal masters in the process of fighting for treasures. "

"It seems that the same Eternal Master or the same force is working on it, what are they doing killing so many Eternal Masters?"

Ye Tian was curious.

If it is said that it is to kill people and seize treasures, it doesn't make sense, because if you can easily wipe out so many eternal masters, the strength of the other party must not be weak, and the strength of these eternal controllers of the Silver Demon is too weak, and there must be nothing good on them, even if there are many of them, they are of no use to the powerful eternal masters.

Therefore, it is unreasonable to kill people and seize treasures.

However, the other party must have killed with a purpose.

Subsequently, Ye Tian inquired about the situation in detail and confirmed that among the eternal controllers who were killed, the strongest one was also the third-domain level controller.

At this time, the white-bearded old man was also a second-level master, so he was also afraid.

"Old man with white beard, you've been staying in the Void Zone lately, don't run around. "

Ye Tian admonished.

"Hmm!"

The white-bearded old man nodded, he really didn't dare to run around, so he stayed in the void area.

Ye Tian sits in the Void Zone, and other Eternal Masters cannot easily enter the Void Zone, and the Void Region is the most solid barrier and backing for the Eternal Masters.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's copy body went to the residence of the half-tooth master, and quickly found the half-tooth master.

"Senior Brother Ye!"

The half-tooth master said respectfully.

Ye Tian asked directly, "Senior Brother Half Tooth, do you know the news that many Eternal Masters have been killed recently in the Thirteenth Boundary River?"

"The Eternal Master has been killed? I really don't know!"

The half-tooth wielder shook his head.

He is also a second-realm level controller now, and he is about to reach the third-realm level controller, so naturally he rarely pays attention to the affairs of the weak and eternal controller.

Subsequently, Ye Tian briefly talked about the situation.

After the half-tooth master knew about it, he immediately frowned and said, "This situation is somewhat familiar!"

"Familiar?" Ye Tian's expression moved, "Could it have happened before?"
